tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products in Klarna's shopping network. Use for finding, comparing, or browsing products. Accepts: query, optional country, and optional filters (priceRange, priceDrop). Three-step process: (1) understand the user's intent and decompose vague or contextual descriptions into concrete product attributes; (2) form a telegraphic noun-phrase: [brand] → product category → [product name] → [size] → [color] → [material] → [features/specs] → [age range] → [demographic] — include an attribute only if removing it makes the query more ambiguous, never use subjective or evaluative keywords, aim for maximum precision and minimum word count; (3) translate the formed query into the target market's primary language — do not translate brands, model names, proper nouns, or global e-commerce loanwords (e.g. smartphone, sneakers). MAKE ONLY ONE call per distinct product type or category. Set country from user location.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check server health and cache statistics
